results.title: Hina Khan Warns Fans Against Trolling Shilpa Shinde, Says ‘I’ll Block You’
results.description: Hina Khan urges her fans to stop trolling Shilpa Shinde after their old Bigg Boss 11 feud reopened over a controversial sexual harassment admission.

results.title: Xbox exclusives will be decided "case by case," says Matt Booty
results.description: Xbox exclusives will be decided on a "case-by-case" basis

results.title: Boyzone fans support 'struggling' Mikey Graham as 'nasty trolls' attack star for reunion appearance - after he said he would never return to band to avoid 'frustration and depression'
results.description: Boyzone fans threw their support behind Mikey Graham after his 'concerning' appearance at the group's final shows over the weekend.
